proxy_query: select * from (SELECT ConfigType, Address, Port, Id, Security, Network, StreamSecurity, Remarks, RequestHost, Path, AllowInsecure, Sni, Alpn, Fingerprint, PublicKey, ShortId, SpiderX, MuxEnabled, IndexId, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY IndexId) AS linenum,flow FROM ProfileItem WHERE IndexId in (SELECT IndexId FROM ProfileExItem where Delay=0) and ConfigType IN (1, 3, 5, 6) ORDER BY IndexId ) a where a.linenum BETWEEN 0 AND 2000;
proxy_query2: select * from (SELECT ConfigType, Address, Port, Id, Security, Network, StreamSecurity, Remarks, RequestHost, Path, AllowInsecure, Sni, Alpn, Fingerprint, PublicKey, ShortId, SpiderX, MuxEnabled, IndexId, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY IndexId) AS linenum FROM ProfileItem WHERE address= 'dns.dressforida.monster' and ConfigType IN (1, 3, 5, 6) ORDER BY IndexId ) a where a.linenum BETWEEN 0 AND 100;
proxy_query1: SELECT ConfigType, Address, Port, Id, Security, Network, StreamSecurity, Remarks, RequestHost, Path, AllowInsecure, Sni, Alpn, Fingerprint, PublicKey, ShortId, SpiderX, MuxEnabled, IndexId, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY IndexId) AS linenum FROM ProfileItem WHERE IndexId in (SELECT IndexId FROM ProfileExItem) and  Subid = '5544178410297751350' ORDER BY IndexId
proxy_query3: SELECT ConfigType, Address, Port, Id, Security, Network, StreamSecurity, Remarks, RequestHost, Path, AllowInsecure, Sni, Alpn, Fingerprint, PublicKey, ShortId, SpiderX, MuxEnabled, IndexId, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY IndexId) AS linenum FROM ProfileItem WHERE IndexId in (SELECT IndexId FROM ProfileExItem where Delay=0)  ORDER BY IndexId
proxy_query4: select * from (SELECT ConfigType, Address, Port, Id, Security, Network, StreamSecurity, Remarks, RequestHost, Path, AllowInsecure, Sni, Alpn, Fingerprint, PublicKey, ShortId, SpiderX, MuxEnabled, IndexId, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY IndexId) AS linenum FROM ProfileItem WHERE Subid <> '5544178410297751350' and  ConfigType IN (1, 3, 5, 6) ORDER BY IndexId) a where a.linenum BETWEEN 0 AND 200;
clear_statements: DELETE FROM profileitem WHERE StreamSecurity = '' AND Subid <> '5544178410297751350';
DELETE FROM ProfileItem WHERE rowid NOT IN (SELECT MIN(rowid) FROM ProfileItem GROUP BY address, port, Network);
DELETE FROM ProfileExItem WHERE IndexId NOT IN (SELECT IndexId FROM ProfileItem);
